provenance.notes: Grass004 2K tiling set staged under source/ambientcg-grass004 (Color/Normal/Roughness/AO/Displacement). Needs slicing into a blade card atlas before it is 'ready'.

lod.label: instanced-card-only
lod.rationale: Ground cover never warrants a mesh or an impostor: one alpha-blade card, instanced densely near and faded out at mid range. No far band — grass culls before the impostor distance.

bands.notes: Slice Grass004 into a 2-4 blade-cluster alpha card; instance with wind.
